name: hardbound
description: Public interface surface for the hardware-bound enterprise trust tier of Web4. TypeScript interfaces an implementation must satisfy to anchor identity, vault, witness chain, and policy in TPM 2.0 / YubiKey / Secure Enclave hardware. The reference closed-source implementation lives at metalinxx.io; this package is the contract.
author: dp-web4 <dp@metalinxx.io>
